item.title: If you don’t take into context to the imperial hegemony, you are enabling it
item.description:
If you don’t take into context to the imperial hegemony, you are enabling it. It really is that simple and if you failed to recognise the proxy states of that empire, you are not protecting them you are enabling them



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Once it is labelled properly, it is noxious to the sensibilities of right about anyone that knows the context#greenscreenvideo
item.description:
Once it is labelled properly, it is noxious to the sensibilities of right about anyone that knows the context#greenscreenvideo

item.title: Aliyah is a euphemism for moving to stolen land and enabling the further theft and colonisation of that land boots on the ground...
item.description:
Aliyah is a euphemism for moving to stolen land and enabling the further theft and colonisation of that land boots on the ground has long been a strategy of Israel and they only spending more money to accelerate it#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Vibes matter, but luckily we have control over vibes and if we choose to neuter ourselves from undermining those vibes then we a...
item.description:
Vibes matter, but luckily we have control over vibes and if we choose to neuter ourselves from undermining those vibes then we are not giving grace to the people that are victims of them we are allowing more people to be victims of them#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is somewhat true Christian evangelical as well but Mormons really do take up an incredible space in influencer spaces, and ...
item.description:
This is somewhat true Christian evangelical as well but Mormons really do take up an incredible space in influencer spaces, and they don’t have beliefs that are that different than Scientology, and yet they have achieved a certain level of normalisation and self victimisation that other cultures just simply haven’t: their 300 billion probly helps with that #greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
